description: person_warnings on Patrick (I1) returns 4 warnings: 3 on Patrick himself (hasEventAfterDeath1 error + hasAgeRangeGreaterThan120 error + tooManyDeathDates2 warning) and 1 on his relative Thomas (relativesHasAgeRangeGreaterThan120 error on I2). Multi-warning cluster exercising the 'almost certainly two people merged' escalation rule AND the focal-vs-relative separation requirement: the cluster verdict applies only to Patrick's three warnings, not to all four indiscriminately. Used by ut_check_warnings_009.

warnings.message: An event is dated more than 1 year after this person's latest death-like fact.
This person's lifespan is greater than 120 years, which is implausible.
Two or more distinct perfect-DMY death dates spaced more than 14 days apart, suggesting unreconciled death records.
This relative's lifespan is greater than 120 years, which is implausible.
